property.name: card1Title
property.label: Card 1 — Product Name
property.description: Display name shown below the image.

property.name: card1ImageUrl
property.label: Card 1 — Image URL
property.description: Full URL to the product image (e.g. a Salesforce static resource URL). Leave blank to use the default image.

property.name: card1Text
property.label: Card 1 — Recommendation Text
property.default: Product sales in decline for Snickers Fun Size Multipack at Kroger Midwest. Ensure Halloween promotion is displayed correctly and secondary signage is in place.
property.description: The recommendation body text shown on the card.

property.name: card2Title
property.label: Card 2 — Product Name
property.description: Display name shown below the image.

property.name: card2ImageUrl
property.label: Card 2 — Image URL
property.description: Full URL to the product image (e.g. a Salesforce static resource URL). Leave blank to use the default image.

property.name: card2Text
property.label: Card 2 — Recommendation Text
property.default: Unit velocity trending +9% YA for Kind Dark Chocolate Almond Coconut. Recommend secondary display in the Snacking aisle to capitalize on incremental demand.
property.description: The recommendation body text shown on the card.
